rationale: The citing paper references Shiv et al. (2005) only as one item in a grouped summary of prior findings that higher prices can increase liking or efficacy. Its core model and predictions are developed from reference-dependent utility and expectation-disconfirmation work, not from Shiv et al.'s specific placebo framework, measures, or experimental design. There is no direct reuse, extension, or explicit test of Shiv et al. beyond broad background positioning.
